headline: Oil Relief Opens the Door for AI to Take Back the Tape
summary: Monday’s rebound on Wall Street looked encouraging on the surface, but beneath it was still the same fragile market story: investors remain glued to every move in oil and the Strait of Hormuz, while eagerly rotating back into AI-linked names the moment energy pressure eases. Lower crude gave the market room to breathe, but not yet a reason to relax.
